content: Release workflow best practice: trigger on 'push tags v*'. Use softprops/action-gh-release or taiki-e/upload-rust-binary-action. Key pitfall: macos-latest changed default arch to arm64 (macos-14) in late 2024, so workflows pinned to macos-latest that relied on x86_64 behavior silently broke. Always pin 'runs-on: macos-13' for x86 and 'macos-14' for arm64. upload-rust-binary-action does cross-compilation automatically using cross or cargo-zigbuild. OpenSSL issues with cross still appear for Linux targets. GITHUB_TOKEN permissions must include 'contents: write' for release asset upload.
